"[9] [Notification] [CHP]-[5] [Appended, 20:56:36] [1] LG POTHOLE IN LNS--- RP HIT IT AND 3 OTHER VEHS ALSO PULLED OVER-- RP GOT TIRE CHANGED ON HIS WAY [Shared]"
